name: Clown Clan Whiteface
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>道化の一座</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウン・クラン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ホワイトフェイス
desc:
You can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing 1 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, or Link Monster. If this card is Tribute Summoned: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Clown Clan Whiteface" once per turn);
● Draw cards equal to the number of monsters Tributed for its Tribute Summon.
● Negate the effects of face-up cards your opponent controls, equal to the number of monsters Tributed for its Tribute Summon.
Once per turn, during your opponent's Main Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Tribute Summon 1 monster.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters

Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
